serviceNotes.engine oil: M271 Kompressor: fixed EU plans commonly 15,000 km or 12 months; rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service (E 200 Kompressor W211 1.8 petrol Tier 2 proxy for M271).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Supercharged four: 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy).
serviceNotes.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months (5-year time cap with long-life coolant; Tier 2 pages for this engine omit coolant km).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Supercharged engine: less DI carbon; address if symptoms.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (E 200 Kompressor W211; Tier 2 proxy for M271 Kompressor)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W211 maintenance plan; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W211
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W211 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 60,000 km / 48 months — aligned with https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service spark plug row (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months: time cap applied per platform rule where auto-abc omits coolant row for this trim; distance from Mercedes long-life coolant specification for W211 petrol
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil ~100,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory belt ~100,000 km — specialist preventive interval
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Supercharged port-injection — carbon cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
